company.registeredOffice: TF-11B, 3rd Floor, Eros Metro Mall, Dwarka Sector-14, New Delhi – 110078, India

documents.title: Channel Partner Onboarding Form
documents.description: KYC application, banking, service selection, declarations, and execution for all channel partner roles.

documents.title: Channel Partner Master Service Agreement
documents.description: Primary legal contract governing POS, AEPS, DMT, BBPS, wallet, QR, settlement, API services, liability, and dispute resolution.

documents.title: Annexure A – Prohibited Activities & Compliance Policy
documents.description: Prohibited transactions, AML monitoring, investigation rights, penalties, blacklisting, and immediate suspension events.

documents.title: Annexure B – Role & Service Schedule
documents.description: Role-specific obligations for Retailer, Distributor, Master Distributor, and API Partner including downline liability.

documents.title: Annexure C – Fee, MDR, Commission & Settlement Schedule
documents.description: Commercial terms including MDR, commissions, instant settlement fees, cut-off times, and settlement cycles.

documents.title: Annexure D – POS / Device Handover & Return Record
documents.description: Device custody acknowledgement, return obligations, and ₹16,000 + GST recovery terms.

documents.title: Annexure E – Privacy Notice & Data Consent (DPDP Act 2023)
documents.description: Personal data processing purposes, retention, sharing, partner obligations, and data subject grievance routing.

documents.title: Annexure F – API Partner Terms
documents.description: API security, webhooks, rate limits, reconciliation, suspension, and integration liability for B2B/API partners.
